candidates.why: Clear top-line sales/revenue label at the top of the income statement; preferred operating revenue line.
Also a valid revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

candidates.row_label: Gain on Sales of Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Non-operating gain, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Non-operating/finance aggregate, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Tax liabilities based on the taxable income for the period
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, not a sum.

candidates.why: Best match for direct operating input costs / cost of sales.
Could be a narrower component of direct costs, but appears empty and less complete than 'Materials and services'.

variables.notes: Selected the broader direct-cost row rather than the narrower/empty 'Materials' row.

candidates.why: Personnel/employee cost is a core operating overhead component.
Typical overhead bucket capturing administrative/other operating costs.
Would be an SG&A component, but appears to be an unused/detail row here.
Generic overhead label, but appears unpopulated and less specific than available components.
R&D-related, but shown as supplemental below the main statement; not needed in SG&A here.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal is present, so selected the best overhead components. Excluded depreciation/amortization/impairments and total expense rows. Did not include supplemental R&D in XSGA because it appears below operating profit/supplemental and may not be embedded in these buckets.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D-labeled row available; although supplemental/below EBIT, it is still the best R&D mapping.

variables.notes: Only dedicated R&D row available is supplemental and appears below operating profit, so mapped XRD to it but did not add it to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Conceptually ideal, but appears unused/duplicate here.
Broad finance cost total, but includes non-interest items such as FX and derivatives; less preferred than components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense component and best core match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; should be included with interest expense.
Also interest-related, but appears unused relative to the lease-liability line.
May contain recurring finance costs beyond pure interest; acceptable as an additional recurring finance-cost component.
Minority share of earnings, not interest expense.
Minority share of earnings, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; less preferred than the main line to avoid duplication.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over total 'Financial expenses'. Excluded FX/derivatives and avoided using the supplemental lease-interest line to prevent duplication.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not balance-sheet book equity.
Income statement profit attribution, not book equity.
Best semantic match for equity attributable to owners/parent, which excludes non-controlling interests.
Financing item, not total book equity.
Only one equity component, not total book equity.
Adjustment line, not total equity.
Total equity line, but includes non-controlling interests so less preferred when owner/parent line exists.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Parent company shareholders' because it should exclude non-controlling interests. Manual review needed because this exact label appears more than once in the balance sheet preview with conflicting values/placements, making the intended row ambiguous if the downstream system cannot distinguish duplicate labels.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest label; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance-sheet minority-interest label; good fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list, not a sum.
